allow: Bash(node -e "const s = require\('sweph'\); console.log\('version:', s.version\(\)\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(s\).slice\(0, 30\).join\(', '\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const s = require\('sweph'\); const c = require\('sweph/constants'\); console.log\('constants keys \(first 60\):'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(c\).slice\(0, 60\).join\(', '\)\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import {constants} from 'sweph'; console.log\('SE_SUN:', constants.SE_SUN, 'SE_MOON:', constants.SE_MOON, 'SE_TRUE_NODE:', constants.SE_TRUE_NODE, 'SEFLG_SIDEREAL:', constants.SEFLG_SIDEREAL, 'SEFLG_SWIEPH:', constants.SEFLG_SWIEPH, 'SE_SIDM_LAHIRI:', constants.SE_SIDM_LAHIRI\);")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); m=d['muhurat']; print\('Rahu:',m['rahuKaal']\); print\('Abhijit:',m['abhijit']\); print\('First day chog:',m['dayChoghadiyas'][0]\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys;k=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['kundli'];print\('Asc :',k['ascendant']['sign']['en'],k['ascendant']['degInSignFormatted']\);print\('Sun :',next\(p for p in k['planets'] if p['key']=='Sun'\)['sign']['en'],next\(p for p in k['planets'] if p['key']=='Sun'\)['degInSignFormatted']\);print\('Moon:',next\(p for p in k['planets'] if p['key']=='Moon'\)['sign']['en'],next\(p for p in k['planets'] if p['key']=='Moon'\)['degInSignFormatted']\);print\('Nak :',k['janmaNakshatra']['en'],'pada',k['janmaNakshatra']['pada']\);print\('Maha:',k['dasha']['birthLord'],'balance',round\(k['dasha']['balanceYears'],2\),'yrs'\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys;k=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['kundli'];print\('Asc en:',k['ascendant']['sign']['en'],'| hi:',k['ascendant']['sign']['hi']\);print\('Sun en:',k['sunRashi']['en'],'| hi:',k['sunRashi']['hi']\);print\('Moon en:',k['moonRashi']['en'],'| hi:',k['moonRashi']['hi']\);print\('Nak en:',k['janmaNakshatra']['en'],'| hi:',k['janmaNakshatra']['hi']\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);print\('Ayanamsas: ',len\(d['ayanamsas']\),'options'\);[print\(' -',a['key'],':',a['label']\) for a in d['ayanamsas']];print\('House sys: ',len\(d['houseSystems']\)\);[print\(' -',h['key'],':',h['label']\) for h in d['houseSystems']];print\('Nodes:     ',len\(d['nodeTypes']\)\);[print\(' -',n['key'],':',n['label']\) for n in d['nodeTypes']]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);m=d['match'];print\('Boy  rashi:',m['boy']['rashi']['en'],'| nakshatra:',m['boy']['nakshatra']['en']\);print\('Girl rashi:',m['girl']['rashi']['en'],'| nakshatra:',m['girl']['nakshatra']['en']\);print\('Total:',m['total'],'/',m['max'],'\(',round\(m['percentage'],1\),'%\)'\);print\('Verdict:',m['verdict']\);[print\(' ',k.ljust\(13\),v['score'],'/',v['max']\) for k,v in m['koots'].items\(\)]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys;r=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['report'];print\('Life Path :',r['coreNumbers']['lifePath']['value'],'-',r['coreNumbers']['lifePath']['meaning']['title']\);print\('Destiny   :',r['coreNumbers']['destiny']['value']\);print\('Soul Urge :',r['coreNumbers']['soulUrge']['value']\);print\('Personality:',r['coreNumbers']['personality']['value']\);print\('Birthday  :',r['coreNumbers']['birthday']['value']\);print\('Maturity  :',r['coreNumbers']['maturity']['value']\);print\('Pers Year :',r['cycles']['personalYear']['value']\);print\('Karmic deb:',[d['number'] for d in r['karmic']['debts']]\);print\('Karmic les:',[l['number'] for l in r['karmic']['lessons']]\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/tarot -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"spread\\":\\"three\\",\\"question\\":\\"What does this week hold?\\"}")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys;r=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['result'];[print\(' ',c['position'].ljust\(8\),'-',c['name'],'\(R\)' if c['reversed'] else '\(U\)','-',c['meaning'][:60]\) for c in r['cards']]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys;r=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['report'];print\(' Is yoga:',r['isYoga'],'| Partial:',r['partial']\);print\(' Front arc:',r['planetsInFrontArc'],'| Back:',r['planetsInBackArc']\);print\(' Rahu house:',r['rahuHouse']\);print\(' Summary:',r['summary']\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys;r=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['report'];print\(' Manglik:',r['isManglik'],'| Severity:',r['severity']\);print\(' Mars houses \(L/M/V\):',r['marsHouseFromLagna'],'/',r['marsHouseFromMoon'],'/',r['marsHouseFromVenus']\);print\(' Cancellation:',r['cancellation']\);print\(' Summary:',r['summary']\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys;r=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['report'];print\(' Active:',r['active'],'| House from Moon:',r['house']\);print\(' Saturn in:',r['saturnSign']['en'],'| Moon in:',r['natalMoonSign']['en']\);print\(' Summary:',r['summary']\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys;r=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['report'];print\(' Asc:',r['ascendant']['en'],'| Lord:',r['ascendantLord']\);print\(' Primary:',r['primaryGem']['gem']\);print\(' Secondary:',[g['gem'] for g in r['secondaryGems']]\);print\(' Avoid:',[g['gem'] for g in r['avoid']]\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys;r=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['report'];print\(' Year:',r['year'],'| Age:',r['yearAge']\);print\(' Varshapravesh:',r['varshapravesh']\);print\(' Muntha sign:',r['munthaSign']['en']\);print\(' Varsha lord:',r['varshaLord']\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys;r=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['report'];[print\(' ',t['key'].ljust\(8\),'in',t['sign']['en'].ljust\(12\),'H'+str\(t['house']\),'\(R\)' if t['retrograde'] else ''\) for t in r['transits']]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys;r=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['report'];print\(' Birth lord:',r['dasha']['birthLord'],'| Balance:',round\(r['dasha']['balanceYears'],2\),'yrs'\);[print\(' ',m['lord'].ljust\(8\),m['start'][:10],'→',m['end'][:10]\) for m in r['dasha']['mahadashas'][:4]]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys;h=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['hora'];print\('Weekday lord:',h['weekdayLord']\);print\('Current hora:',h['current']['lord'] if h['current'] else None\);print\('First 6 day horas:'\);[print\(' ',i+1,h['horas'][i]['lord'],h['horas'][i]['start'][11:16],'-',h['horas'][i]['end'][11:16]\) for i in range\(6\)]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys;m=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['muhurta'];print\('Day muhurtas:'\);[print\(' ',i+1,d['name'].ljust\(15\),'-',d['nature']\) for i,d in enumerate\(m['day'][:8]\)];print\('Night muhurtas \(Jiva/Brahma should be very auspicious\):'\);[print\(' ',i+1,d['name'].ljust\(15\),'-',d['nature']\) for i,d in enumerate\(m['night'][10:13]\)]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys;g=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['gowri'];print\('Day slots:'\);[print\(' ',s['slot'],s['name'].ljust\(8\),'-',s['quality'],s['start'][11:16]\) for s in g['daySlots']]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys;r=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['report'];print\('Placements with needs-remedy flag:'\);[print\(' ',p['key'].ljust\(8\),'H'+str\(p['house']\),'needs:',p['needsRemedy'],'-',p['keynote'][:40]\) for p in r['placements']];print\(\);print\('Teva first 5 years:'\);[print\(' age',t['age'],'house',t['house']\) for t in r['teva'][:5]]")
